new_content.name: Anima weapon story quests
new_content.description: Adjustments to the anima weapon questline, including lowering the Allagan tomestones cost for Aether Oil.

new_content.name: Fires of Sohm Al
new_content.description: Side quest associated with an orchestrion roll reward.

new_content.name: Party Finder
new_content.description: System allowing players to recruit or join parties; updated to allow joining while queued for a duty and added sound notifications upon recruitment completion.

new_content.name: Deep Dungeon
new_content.description: A battle system area; patch notes reference the restriction of pomander usage to this specific area.

glamour.name: Shiva's Diamond Shield
glamour.description: A shield crafted from the crystalline remains of the primal Shiva.

glamour.name: Aegis Shield
glamour.description: An ancient and legendary shield once wielded by a hero of old.

glamour.name: Aegis Shield Replica
glamour.description: A decorative replica of the legendary Aegis Shield, primarily used for glamour.

glamour.name: Aegis Shield Zeta Replica
glamour.description: A high-fidelity replica of the perfected Zeta form of the Aegis Shield, used for glamour purposes.
